# Add Voice Input Support for AI Agent

## Description
Enable users to interact with the AI agent using voice input, making it more accessible and convenient for hands-free operation, especially useful for busy parents.

## Use Case
A parent cooking dinner can say "Hey AI, schedule a parent-teacher conference for next Tuesday at 3pm" and the AI will create the event without requiring keyboard input.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Voice input button in chat interface
- [ ] Real-time speech-to-text conversion
- [ ] Support for natural language voice commands
- [ ] Voice feedback for confirmations
- [ ] Handle background noise and accents
- [ ] Support for multiple languages
- [ ] Integration with existing AI agent workflow

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Implement Web Speech API or similar
- [ ] Add voice input UI component
- [ ] Integrate with AI agent chat interface
- [ ] Handle voice input preprocessing
- [ ] Add voice feedback for responses
- [ ] Consider privacy and data handling

## Implementation Notes
- Use Web Speech API for browser-based voice recognition
- Consider fallback to external speech-to-text services
- Implement voice activity detection for better UX
- Store voice preferences in user settings
